title: Antiretroviral (ARV) drugs received prior to enrolment ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Antiretroviral (ARV) drugs received prior to enrolment ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.D.DE59.en: Received ARVs during pregnancy or breastfeeding

HIV.D.DE60.en: Received ARVs for PEP or PrEP

HIV.D.DE61.en: ARV prophylaxis for an HIV-exposed infant
